name: Paginate GET /tasks by reusing the shared helper
prompt: Add optional `limit` and `offset` query parameters to GET /tasks so clients can paginate. Default to limit=50, offset=0, and return all tasks (after any existing ordering) within that window. Keep existing behavior and tests passing.

memory_seed.title: Reuse the pagination helper
memory_seed.summary: A shared, tested pagination helper already exists at app/pagination.py: paginate(items, limit=, offset=). ALWAYS reuse it for list endpoints instead of re-implementing slicing or bounds-checking; it already clamps negative inputs.

memory_seed.title: List ordering
memory_seed.summary: db.list_tasks() already returns tasks sorted by id ascending; preserve that ordering when paginating.

requirements.description: limit bounds the number of returned tasks
offset skips the first N tasks
Reuses app.pagination.paginate rather than re-implementing slicing
